resources.string: This removes the project and its rooms from your device.
Unable to delete this project right now.
Delete this photo from the project?
Unable to delete this photo right now.
Photo deleted. We will finish syncing shortly.
Delete \"%1$s\"? This removes the room and its items from this project.
Room deleted. We will finish syncing shortly.
Unable to delete this room right now.
Open a project to delete it.
Failed to load image processor config: %1$s
Every upload we send to the image processor is tracked here until it completes.
No assemblies yet. Create one to see it show up.
Retry started. We\'ll try this assembly again now.
Remove local data for assembly %1$s? This won\'t delete anything already sent to the server.
Remove every local image processor assembly and its upload data from this device.
The map view is coming soon.
No assigned projects yet. Create one or view all.
No WIP projects to show on the map.
Invite your team to see them here.
You cannot remove yourself from the team
Unable to save contact. Please try again.
Unable to delete. Please try again.
Unable to save opportunity. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
Are you sure you want to delete this opportunity?
Are you sure you want to delete this note?
Are you sure you want to delete this task?
Saved but custom fields failed to save
Are you sure you want to delete this business?
No contacts associated with this business.
Please enter a valid email address.
Please enter a valid phone number.
Please enter your email. We\'ll use it to either create your account or sign you in.
Password must be at least 6 characters
By signing up, you agree to receive updates and special offers about RocketPlan products. You may unsubscribe at any time.
View our Privacy Policy and Terms and Conditions
Unable to start %1$s sign-in. Please try again.
Opening links outside the app is not allowed on this device.
How would you like to get started?
Start fresh with your own company account.
Join an existing company with an invite link.
To join an existing company, you\'ll need an invite link from your team admin. Check your email for an invitation.
We\'ll send a verification code to confirm your number.
Please enter a valid phone number
Tell us a bit about yourself.
View the company associated with your account.
Unable to load company info. Check your connection and try again.
Unable to load the page right now. Please check your connection and try again.
RocketPlan helps restoration teams capture documentation, coordinate field work, and get paid faster with streamlined workflows.
Unable to open that link. Please try again later.
No room types match your search.
Unable to load room types. Try again.
Add property details to this project before creating rooms.
Property details are syncing. Try again shortly.
Project info is still loading. Please wait and try again.
Start building your project by adding rooms.
Enter a value for each field.
Save this record with a photo of your meter. We recommend having a photo record for your reports.
This log will be permanently deleted.
Unable to add material goal. Try again.
No project photos yet. Capture images with RocketScan to populate this album.
No damages captured for this room yet.
Add a scope of work item for this room.
No scope items available yet. Add a custom item instead.
Could not add scope items. Check your connection and try again.
Only quantity can be updated for this line item.
Enter a quantity greater than zero.
Enter a valid rate or leave blank.
Enter a valid number or leave blank.
Optional: set a moisture target to track progress.
Unable to save material. Please try again.
Set a moisture target to track drying progress
No scope items for this room yet.
Add details for work in this room.
Could not load photos. Check your connection and retry.
Unable to update project alias. Please try again.
Collect property and loss details here.
No Betterments or Content Claims yet.
No locations synced for this project.
View all project photos and documents by folder.
View all notes added to the project
Viewing all project notes is coming soon.
This note will be removed from the project.
Couldn\'t load project data. Pull to refresh.
Capture new photos for this room.
Camera permission is required to capture photos.
Could not prepare storage for the new photo.
Unable to open the camera on this device.
Idle \u2013 tap Start to discover FLIR device
Camera permission is required for FLIR capture.
Flash not available in IR mode
Idle \u2013 tap Start to scan streams
Idle \u2013 tap Start to view IR feed
Unable to update the property. Please try again.
Project is still syncing. Please wait a moment before creating a property.
Manual address entry is coming soon.
Unable to create the project. Please try again.
Missing company context. Please refresh and try again.
Address could not be created. Please try again.
Unable to search addresses. Please try again.
Tap the button below to take photos
Camera is not available on this device
No companies available for this user
This will keep your local changes for all conflicts and push them to the server.
This will discard your local changes and keep the server version for all conflicts.
This will dismiss all conflicts without syncing changes.
All sync conflicts have been resolved.
Are you sure you want to close this conversation?
Track your time on this project.
No timecards yet. Clock in to start tracking time.
Are you sure you want to delete this timecard?
Add team members to this project.
Unable to add crew members. Check your connection.
Unable to remove crew member. Check your connection.
Unable to load crew. Pull to refresh.
Record the current dryness of the %1$s %2$s
Your latest average will be coloured from Red to Green based on how far it is from your drying goal.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Invalid email address in a field on another page
Invalid phone number in a field on another page
Please fill all required fields before submitting
